stemHtml: Choose the correct statement about auto-brake systems (ABS)...

options.a: For a given touchdown ground speed on a dry runway without the use of reverse thrust, the stopping distance solely dependents on the selected ABS setting and weight of the airplane.
options.b: Without pilot interference an auto-brake system continues to operate until standstill.
options.c: A take-off warning during the take-off will be generated if the auto-brake system has not been armed.
options.d: An armed auto-brake system will always try to achieve the selected deceleration level directly after main wheel touchdown.
